_note: Batch D1 (ROUND 3, medieval Europe 800-1400 AD): documented parents of the round-2 grandparents in batches3/d_800_1400_1.json, going ONE generation further back (great-grandparents). New ancestors use the R3B_ prefix. Unknown parents are '—' placeholders. Disputed/traditional parentage flagged in-label with ⚠. DEDUP: this depth converges hard, so several batch entries were connected UP into ancestors already in the tree rather than creating duplicates -- reused EXISTING ids: HENRYFOWLER+MATRING (parents of Gerberga of Saxony), SPG_WILLIAM3AQ+SPG_ADELENORMANDY (parents of William IV of Aquitaine), R2D_GEOFFREYIANJOU+R2D_ADELEMEAUX (parents of Fulk III Nerra -- both already in tree, Adele of Meaux is herself a batch entry), SPL_ADALBERTITALY (father of Otto-William of Burgundy), and R2D_ERMENTRUDEROUCY (mother of Beatrice de Macon -- Beatrice was Otto-William's stepdaughter by Ermentrude's first marriage to Aubry II of Macon). SKIPPED (parentage genuinely undocumented/disputed, no fabrication): R2L_EBERHARD_SULICHGAU (two irreconcilable candidate fathers, Unruoch III of Friuli vs Adelhard von Burc, no consensus), R2D_LUITPOLD_BAV (descent 'not conclusively established', Ernst II only probable), R2D_WIGERIC (origins undocumented per Wikipedia), R2D_ERICVICTORIOUS (saga-only, Adam of Bremen cannot confirm Emund as father), R2E_CONRAD1SWABIA (parents 'not known for certain', only rival candidates), R2D_CONSTANCEARLES (origin unattested, per its own label), R2D_WYNFLAED (parents unknown), R2D_JUDICAELBERENGAR (parentage 'significantly disputed... no reliable evidence' per Wikipedia). Also SKIPPED as a pre-existing DUPLICATE: R2L_BURCHARDII_SWABIA is the same person as R2D_BURCHARDII_SWABIA (two round-2 nodes for Burchard II of Swabia); connected the primary node R2D_BURCHARDII_SWABIA to Burchard I and left the duplicate unlinked to avoid showing him twice as his own sibling. Verified against Wikipedia, July 2026.

families.note: Gerberga of Saxony -> parents Henry the Fowler (HENRYFOWLER) & Matilda of Ringelheim (MATRING), both already in the tree. Convergence. Wikipedia.
William IV 'Fierebras' of Aquitaine -> parents William III 'Towhead' (SPG_WILLIAM3AQ) & Adele of Normandy (SPG_ADELENORMANDY), both already in the tree. Convergence. Wikipedia.

Fulk III 'Nerra' of Anjou -> parents Geoffrey I 'Grisegonelle' (R2D_GEOFFREYIANJOU) & Adele of Meaux (R2D_ADELEMEAUX), both already in the tree (Adele is herself a batch entry). Convergence. Wikipedia.

a.label:
Aubry II
d.before 982 AD · Count of Mâcon; first husband of Ermentrude of Roucy · Wikipedia

families.note: Beatrice de Macon -> father Aubry II, Count of Macon (new), & mother Ermentrude of Roucy (R2D_ERMENTRUDEROUCY, already in tree). Beatrice was Ermentrude's daughter by her first marriage, and thus stepdaughter of Otto-William. Convergence on the mother. Wikipedia.

b.label:
Gerberga of Mâcon
fl.950s AD · wife of Adalbert of Italy; mother of Otto-William; m.(2) Henry I, Duke of Burgundy · Wikipedia

families.note: Otto-William, Count of Burgundy -> father Adalbert (II) of Italy (SPL_ADALBERTITALY, already in tree) & mother Gerberga of Macon (new). Convergence on the father. Wikipedia.

children.label:
William

families.note: Odo I of Orleans -> father Adrian, Count of Orleans (Udalriching), & (poss.) mother Waldrada. Brothers William, Guy of Maine & abbot Theodo were killed with Odo in 834 (Vita Hludowici). Wikipedia.
